vanilla-jam-with-apple-argiro.name: Vanilla Jam With Apple

ingredients.item: As much sugar as it raises
As much sugar as it raises

instructions: Fruits must be ripe and strong, without blows. We wash them well.
Clean the apples and cut them into bites.
Put them in a pot.
Remove the pits from the vanillas and add them to the pot.
Pour with 3/4 cup of water, cover the pot and simmer over low heat for 15 minutes after boiling until the fruits soften well and melt.
Count the pulp (the mixture of fruits). All the cups it is, so many cups of sugar we add.
Mix well until the sugar melts.
Boil the jam over medium heat, 15-20 minutes after boiling again, until it thickens.
To the end, add the lemon juice and let it bottle for 1–2 minutes.
Fill sterile jars with hot vanilla jam to the top (to overflow).
Seal with the lids and turn over on the counter (the lid to touch the counter) until cool.
We keep them in our locker.
When we open the jar with jam, keep it in the refrigerator.

veal-osso-buco.name: Veal Osso Buco
instructions: 1. Lay the veal shanks in a shallow baking pan and sprinkle liberally on both sides with salt. Refrigerate for 2 hours.

2. Rinse the veal shanks of their salt and pat dry with paper towels. Wrap each veal shank once around the circumference so that it holds the bone and meat together in the center. Tie the twine with a good knot. Season the veal shanks with pepper.
3. Preheat the oven to 177°C.
4. Heat a large, ovenproof casserole over high heat. Put the oil into the casserole and let it heat.

5. Meanwhile, put the flour in a shallow bowl, dredge the veal shanks in it, and pat off the excess. Brown the veal shanks in the hot oil for about 5 minutes on each side, or until browned on all sides. Remove from the pan and set aside. If the oil turns dark during the process, discard it and heat a fresh cup of oil.

6. Add the carrots, celery, onion, and garlic to the pan and cook over medium-high heat for 2 to 3 minutes, stirring constantly. Add the wine, bring to a boil, and cook for about 2 minutes, or until reduced by half.

7. Add the stocks, tomatoes, thyme, rosemary, and bay leaf to the pan. Return the veal shanks to the pan and bring to a boil over high heat. Once the liquid boils, cover, transfer to the oven, and cook for 2 1/2 hours, until the meat is fork tender and falling off the bones.

8. Remove the herbs from the braising liquid and discard. Let the veal shanks come to room temperature in the braising liquid. Remove the veal shanks and set aside. Strain the liquid through a fine-mesh sieve or chinois into a large saucepan. Bring to a boil over medium-high heat, reduce the heat, and simmer for 10 to 15 minutes, or until reduced by a quarter. Using a skimmer or large spoon, skim off any grease or foam that rises to the surface. Return the strained vegetables to the liquid and taste for seasoning.

9. To serve, cut and discard the twine, put a single osso buco (veal shank) in a bowl, and ladle about 3/4 cup of the sauce and vegetables over it. (If the sauce and the meat are not still warm, heat them together very gently over low heat for 8 to 10 minutes.)
10. Garnish each osso buco with the fresh horseradish, lemon zest, and chopped parsley and season with pepper.

veal-roasted-in-the-oven-teleculinaria.name: Veal Roasted In The Oven
instructions: Lay the olive oil in a bowl, add the peeled garlic teeth and the pepper paste and crush with the magic wand. Season the empty with salt and crushed pepper beans and then bar it with this prepared.

Remove from the oven, let it rest a little, cut into thin slices and serve decorated to taste. Follow with sautéed potatoes or other garrison.

vegan-apple-cake-recipe-comedera.name: Vegan Apple Cake Recipe
vegan-apple-cake-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de bizcocho vegano de manzana

ingredients.item: 1 oz (30 gr) de crema de almendras

instructions: It starts the recipe and preheats the oven at 180 been 3 (350ºF).
En un bol, tamiza con un colador el harina, junto a la sal, la canela y el bicarbonato de sodio para eliminar los grumos.
Ahora, en otro bol mezcla la leche de almendras, el vinagre de manzana y la vainilla.
It opens up space in the middle of the flour mix, a volcano type, and proceeds to add little by little the liquid mixture and vegetable oil. Bat with a manual beaker till you have a pasty texture.
Produce and add frosted apples and almond cream that will give you a more intense touch. with a spatula you put them together well till you have a homogenous mix.
Take the mold where you'll bake the biscuit and grease and flour.
Stretch the mixture into the mold and as soon as it's built in, you'll have a few pics till everything's settled.
Lleva tu bizcocho al horno de 25 a 30 minutos aproximadamente para que se hornee.
At 25 minutes, apply paddle technique. Enter one, if it gets wet it's missing more cooking and you have to leave it for longer. Otherwise get him out of the oven.
Let them cool at the mold for 10 minutes and then move them to the grid. Let them cool for an hour.
They are cut into triangles or slices.
Enjoy!

vegan-ceviche-recipe-comedera.name: Vegan Ceviche Recipe
instructions: Vamos a iniciar la receta de ceviche vegano, cortando nuestra cebolla en julianas.
Do the same with the tomato but cut them into pieces.
Since we know that pounding's very delicate, try to be careful when you're about to mink it. Cut him into pieces.
The corn should be pitted and cooked by now, and you can buy it in cans.
Put all the vegetables in a bowl, then you'll add the lemon.
Ahora, salpimienta a tu gusto.
With the help of a spatula, we will mix very gently and delicate so as to avoid breaking the palmito.
Sirve y degusta. Puedes decorar con perejil o cilantro.

vegan-stuffed-peppers.name: Vegan Stuffed Peppers

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Heat oil in a saucepan over medium-high heat. Add onion and garlic; cook and stir until onion is soft but not browning, about 5 minutes. Add buckwheat; stir until coated, about 1 minute. Add broth and bring to a boil. Simmer until liquid is absorbed, about 15 minutes. Add tomatoes, parsley, red pepper flakes, salt, and pepper. Cook and stir until heated through, about 3 minutes.
Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).

Remove tops and seeds from peppers. Place a steamer insert into a saucepan and fill with water to just below the bottom of the steamer. Bring water to a boil. Add peppers, cover, and steam until tender, about 5 minutes.
Stand peppers up in a casserole dish and fill them with the buckwheat mixture.
Bake in the preheated oven until browned, about 15 minutes.

vegetable-lasagna.name: Vegetable Lasagna
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Grease an 8x12-inch baking dish.

Combine tomatoes, garlic, basil, salt, and black pepper in a medium saucepan over high heat; bring to a boil. Reduce heat to low; simmer to blend flavors, about 10 minutes. Combine ricotta cheese and egg in a bowl.

Lightly coat the baking dish with tomato sauce; place 3 noodles on top, lengthwise. Top with ¼ remaining tomato sauce; spread ⅓ ricotta mixture on top with a rubber spatula. Scatter ⅓ each carrots and spinach on top, followed by ¼ mozzarella. Repeat layers twice more. Place remaining 3 noodles on top; top with remaining ¼ each tomato sauce and mozzarella. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
Cover dish with aluminum foil; bake 30 minutes. Remove foil and bake until cheese is bubbling and lightly brown, about 10 minutes more. Let stand before cutting, 15 minutes.

instructions: Lava muy bien todas las verduras, ponlas bajo el grifo y retira la tierra que pueda tener.
The broccoli should be washed with a wet towel.
Cut the vegetables into thin cuts. The carrots in cane, the leeks in strips, the broccoli in branches. Take back the bottom of the asparagus stem.
Cut 4 pieces of paper of aluminium and pour an oil chorrit onto each and put up with the asparagus cut in half and with pumpkins.
Put up his broccoli and some carrot sticks.
Incorpora las tiras de puerro. Sazona y nuevamente y vierte otro chorrito de aceite sobre las verduras.
Close every package by sealing the edges well so that the closure will be hermetic.
Bake them at 225 ° C for 15 minutes.
Sirve cada paquete individualmente abriendo la parte superior en el momento de consumir.

very-brisket.name: Very Brisket
instructions: Layer the onions, potatoes, and carrots into the bottom of a large Dutch oven. Place the brisket on top of the vegetables.
Mix the beef broth, onion soup mix, ketchup, and ginger ale in a bowl, and pour it over the brisket and vegetables. Bring to a boil over high heat, cover, and reduce heat to a simmer.
Simmer the brisket until tender, about 2 1/2 hours.
